meaning: n.海盗,盗印者,盗版者,侵犯专利权者vt.盗印,盗版,掠夺,翻印vi.做海盗
examples: Ed played at being a pirate.
Pirate copies of the DVD are already being sold.
Two new parties performed particularly well: Bright Future, which won six seats, and the Pirate party, with three.
The Pirate Bay, unexpectedly, spoke out Wednesday afternoon against the Anonymous attacks on its behalf.
